title: Irish Kale Salad
description: A hearty salad made with sautéed kale, diced Irish potatoes, and a crispy topping.
instructions: 2. Toss diced Irish potatoes with 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped kale and cook until wilted, about 3-5 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, combine roasted potatoes, wilted kale, and thin slices of red onion.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar and a pinch of salt. Pour over the potato-kale mixture and toss to combine.
6. Serve over a bed of mixed greens and enjoy!
